g.style: animation: aliceFloat 9s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: -3s; opacity: 0.6;
animation: aliceSpin 20s linear infinite; transform-origin: 40px 420px; opacity: 0.6;

g.text: Computer Engineer · Fullstack Developer · AI Enthusiast
Building scalable backend services with Java, Spring Boot, and strong API design practices
Shipping web and mobile interfaces with React, Next.js, and Flutter
Exploring how AI can automate workflows and implementing LLMs
Strong interest in product-minded engineering and clean architecture
Comfortable collaborating in English and Spanish across multidisciplinary teams
You take the blue pill, the story ends.
You take the red pill, you stay in Wonderland.
